name: Missed some work before reporting injury in West Valley, hurts claim?
description: No, if within 180 days; explain gaps.[1]

mainEntity.name: Missed some work before reporting injury in West Valley, hurts claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, if within 180 days; explain gaps.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No if reported within 180 days; but gaps raise doubts—explain with records.[1][2] Key factors: Wage docs show losses. Practical guidance: Submit pay stubs; doctor notes timeline. Promptness still key despite prior absences.[1] Focus on injury proof.[2]
